case_title: DEVINE JR., WILLIAM E. vs. SPRUELL, SHAUNTE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT SERVED DEC-20-1998, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $147.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVINE JR., WILLIAM E. AS TO DEFENDANT SPRUELL, SHAUNTE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRUELL, SHAUNTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1490 DYKE ST, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
